title: Fidelity Launches GENIUS-Aligned Money Market Fund for Stablecoin Issuers
summary: Fidelity has introduced a new money market fund that invests exclusively in assets permitted for stablecoin issuers under the GENIUS Act. This move aims to provide stablecoin issuers with compliant, high-quality reserve options.
body:
Fidelity, a major financial services company, has launched a new money market fund designed specifically for stablecoin issuers. The fund invests only in eligible reserve assets as defined by the GENIUS Act, a regulatory framework for stablecoins in the United States.

The GENIUS Act outlines strict requirements for the types of assets that stablecoin issuers can hold in reserve. Fidelity's fund will focus on high-quality, liquid assets that meet these standards, providing a compliant investment option for stablecoin issuers looking to manage their reserves effectively.

This development is significant for the stablecoin industry, as it offers issuers a regulated and trusted avenue to manage their reserves. By investing in Fidelity's fund, stablecoin issuers can ensure their reserves are held in assets that comply with federal regulations, reducing the risk of non-compliance and potential penalties.

Stablecoin users and investors should watch for how this fund impacts the stability and transparency of major stablecoins. As more issuers adopt compliant reserve strategies, the overall trust in stablecoins could increase, benefiting the broader crypto ecosystem. Keep an eye on announcements from major stablecoin issuers regarding their reserve management strategies.
twitterThread: Fidelity just launched a money market fund for stablecoin issuers, aligned with the GENIUS Act. This could make stablecoins more reliable for everyday users.
The fund invests only in assets approved for stablecoin reserves under the GENIUS Act, ensuring compliance and reducing risk for issuers.

If you use stablecoins, watch for issuers adopting this fund—it could mean more stable and trustworthy reserves. Read more → https://cryptocatalyst.news/articles/2026-06-19-fidelity-launches-genius-aligned-money-market-fund-for-stablecoin-issuers
